creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Have you been to a CAVE-themed cafe?

This cafe in Abu Dhabi is stunning! The gray rocky interior made us feel like we’re dining in a real cave. 

They have great food and drinks selection. Since we went there just for afternoon snacks, we had Iced Matcha, Halloumi Fries, and Affogato. Would love to try the tapas and burgers next time. 😋

📍 @caveabudhabi Al Qana
💰 drinks at AED 25-40, bites at AED 40+

Save this your for next coffee date! 

#CaveCafe #AbuDhabi #visitAbuDhabi #abudhabicafe #abudhabirestaurant #ladyandhersweetescapes

transcription.text: I think I'll take my whiskey and eat My coffee black and my bed at three You're too sweet for me
